name: Yash Srivastava
bio1: I'm a product designer passionate about creating intuitive, accessible, and visually engaging digital experiences. With a background in design thinking and HCI from DIT University, I specialize in user research, design systems, and micro-interactions.
bio2: Currently, I'm working as an Assistant Professor at Lovely Professional University (LPU), sharing my design expertise with the next generation. I also take on freelance projects, helping brands like The Park Bangalore and Resole.io build cohesive digital identities.
